title: /kernel:run
summary_text: Manifest structure: - `Kernel orchestration is active for this session.` - `Bootstrap target: 6+ lanes (minimum 6).` - `Active models: <main codex model>, gpt-5.3-codex-spark, <live GLM model evidence>` - `Lane manifest:` - `- main: routing/synthesis - bootstrap orchestration [provider:codex] [agent:kernel-main] [subagent:none]` - `- lane-1: execution/exploration - contract extraction [provider:codex] [agent:<nickname>] [subagent:subagent1]` - `- lane-2: verification/review - bootstrap risk audit [provider:codex] [agent:<nickname>] [subagent:subagent2]` - `- lane-3: execution/support - receipt command validation [provider:codex] [agent:<nickname>] [subagent:subagent3]` - `- lane-4: monitoring/context - provider evidence audit [provider:codex] [agent:<nickname>] [subagent:subagent4]` - `- lane-5: simulation - bootstrap rehearsal [provider:codex] [agent:<nickname>] [subagent:subagent6]` - `- lane-6: external review - normal-shape bootstrap critique [provider:glm] [agent:bridge-glm] [subagent:none]` - `- lane-7: specialist review - quota-aware bootstrap critique [provider:<copilot|gemini-cli>] [agent:bridge-<provider>] [subagent:none]` Compliance caveats: - Do not acknowledge until the GLM lane and one specialist lane are actually live; planned or sampled lanes do not count. - `Active models:` must use live evidence from this run only; if the specialist lane exposes no model name, omit its model from that line rather than invent one. - The receipt must be written before the acknowledgement and must include manifest lane count plus agent/subagent label flags. - If the specialist is `gemini-cli`, current run health must be rechecked because an installed-but-broken CLI is not a valid active lane.
